    {

    <style>
        #firstPaint {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: #ffffff;
            z-index: 999999;
            font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .fpWrap{
            max-width: 1180px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 18px 14px 22px;
        }
        .fpTop{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:space-between;
            gap:12px;
            padding: 8px 2px 14px;
        }
        .fpBrand{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            gap:10px;
            font-weight:700;
            letter-spacing:.2px;
        }
        .fpLogo{
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,.06);
        }
        .fpBtnRow{ display:flex; gap:10px; }
        .fpBtn{
            height: 34px;
            padding: 0 12px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.08);
            background: rgba(0,0,0,.02);
            font-size: 13px;
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:center;
            min-width: 84px;
        }
        .fpGrid{
            display:grid;
            grid-template-columns: 240px 1fr;
            gap: 14px;
        }
        .fpSide{
            border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);
            border-radius: 14px;
            padding: 12px;
        }
        .fpMain{
            border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);
            border-radius: 14px;
            padding: 12px;
            overflow:hidden;
        }
        .fpRowTitle{
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:space-between;
            padding: 2px 2px 10px;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        .fpCards{
            display:grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 10px;
        }
        .fpCard{
            border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 10px;
        }
        .fpThumb{
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
            border-radius: 10px;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,.06);
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        .fpLine{ height: 10px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(0,0,0,.06); }
        .fpLine.sm{ width: 70%; margin-top: 8px; }
        .fpLine.xs{ width: 50%; margin-top: 6px; opacity: .8; }

        /* shimmer */
        .shimmer{
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,0,0,.05) 25%, rgba(0,0,0,.09) 37%, rgba(0,0,0,.05) 63%);
            background-size: 400% 100%;
            animation: shimmer 1.1s ease infinite;
        }
        @keyframes  shimmer{
            0%{ background-position: 100% 0; }
            100%{ background-position: 0 0; }
        }

        @media (max-width: 980px){
            .fpGrid{ grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
            .fpCards{ grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); }
        }
    </style>

    <!-- Microsoft Clarity (same as before, async) -->
    <script type="text/javascript">
        (function(c,l,a,r,i,t,y){
            c[a]=c[a]||function(){(c[a].q=c[a].q||[]).push(arguments)};
            t=l.createElement(r);t.async=1;t.src="https://www.clarity.ms/tag/"+i;
            y=l.getElementsByTagName(r)[0];y.parentNode.insertBefore(t,y);
        })(window, document, "clarity", "script", "uutrlyz0md");
    </script>

                                    <style>/* ===========================
   Wavswap Guide Modal (SAFE CSS)
   No rgba(), no CSS variables, no min()
   =========================== */

#wsGuideOverlay{
  position: fixed;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
  z-index: 999999;
  pointer-events: none;
}

#wsGuideOverlay .wsGuide-backdrop{
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
  background-color: #0000008C; /* black with alpha */
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity .18s ease;
}

#wsGuideOverlay .wsGuide-modal{
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -46%) scale(.98);
  width: 560px;
  max-width: calc(100vw - 24px);
  background-color: #FFFFFFF2; /* white with alpha */
  border: 1px solid #00000014;
  border-radius: 18px;
  box-shadow: 0 22px 60px #00000040;
  padding: 18px 18px 16px;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity .18s ease, transform .18s ease;
}

#wsGuideOverlay.wsGuide-open{
  pointer-events: auto;
}

#wsGuideOverlay.wsGuide-open .wsGuide-backdrop{
  opacity: 1;
}

#wsGuideOverlay.wsGuide-open .wsGuide-modal{
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
}

/* Header */
.wsGuide-header{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:12px;
  margin-bottom:6px;
}

.wsGuide-badge{
  font-weight: 900;
  font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: .6px;
  color: #FFFFFF;
  padding: 6px 10px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #552BFC, #7C5CFF);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 24px #552BFC47;
}

.wsGuide-x{
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  font-size: 26px;
  line-height: 1;
  cursor:pointer;
  color: #0E0F12A6;
  padding: 6px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
}

.wsGuide-x:hover{
  background-color: #0000000D;
}

/* Text */
.wsGuide-title{
  margin: 6px 0 6px;
  font-size: 22px;
  line-height: 1.15;
  font-weight: 900;
  color: #0E0F12;
  letter-spacing: -.2px;
}

.wsGuide-sub{
  margin: 0 0 12px;
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.65;
  color: #0E0F12AD;
  font-weight: 700;
}

/* Key guide box */
.wsGuide-keys{
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  gap:10px;
  padding: 12px;
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 1px solid #00000014;
  background-color: #FFFFFFBF;
}

.wsGuide-keyRow{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:12px;
}

.wsGuide-key{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  width: 42px;
  height: 34px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid #0000001F;
  background-color: #0E0F1208;
  font-weight: 900;
  color: #0E0F12DB;
}

.wsGuide-text{
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #0E0F12C7;
  font-size: 13.5px;
}

.wsGuide-foot{
  margin: 12px 0 12px;
  color: #0E0F12B3;
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 13.5px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Buttons */
.wsGuide-actions{
  display:flex;
  gap:10px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}

.wsGuide-btn{
  border:0;
  cursor:pointer;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  font-weight: 900;
  font-size: 13.5px;
  transition: transform .12s ease, box-shadow .12s ease, background .12s ease;
}

.wsGuide-btn:active{
  transform: translateY(1px);
}

.wsGuide-btnPrimary{
  color:#FFFFFF;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #552BFC, #7C5CFF);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 34px #552BFC38;
}

.wsGuide-btnGhost{
  color: #0E0F12D9;
  background-color: #0E0F120D;
  border: 1px solid #0000001A;
}

/* Footer note */
.wsGuide-mini{
  margin-top: 12px;
  padding-top: 12px;
  border-top: 1px solid #00000014;
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 12.5px;
  color: #0E0F1299;
}

/* Floating Guide button */
.wsGuide-fab{
  position: fixed;
  right: 16px;
  top: 96px;
  z-index: 1000000;
  border: 0;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-weight: 900;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #FFFFFF;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #552BFC, #7C5CFF);
  box-shadow: 0 16px 34px #552BFC40;
}

@media (max-width: 480px){
  .wsGuide-title{ font-size: 20px; }
  .wsGuide-fab{ top: 84px; right: 12px; }
  .wsGuide-btn{ width: 100%; }
}</style>

  var s=document.createElement('script');

  s.async=true;
  s.onerror=function(){ console.log('WS AI widget failed to load:', s.src); };
  (document.head||document.documentElement).appendChild(s);
})();
</script>

    <div id="firstPaint" aria-hidden="true">
        <div class="fpWrap">
            <div class="fpTop">
                <div class="fpBrand">
                    <div class="fpLogo shimmer"></div>
                    <div>Wavswap</div>
                </div>
                <div class="fpBtnRow">
                    <div class="fpBtn shimmer"></div>
                    <div class="fpBtn shimmer"></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="fpGrid">
                <div class="fpSide">
                    <div class="fpLine shimmer"></div>
                    <div class="fpLine sm shimmer"></div>
                    <div class="fpLine xs shimmer"></div>
                    <div style="height:12px"></div>
                    <div class="fpLine shimmer"></div>
                    <div class="fpLine sm shimmer"></div>
                    <div class="fpLine xs shimmer"></div>
                </div>

                <div class="fpMain">
                    <div class="fpRowTitle">
                        <span>Popular Packs</span>
                        <span class="fpLine xs shimmer" style="width:120px;height:12px"></span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="fpCards">
                        <div class="fpCard">
                            <div class="fpThumb shimmer"></div>
                            <div class="fpLine shimmer"></div>
                            <div class="fpLine sm shimmer"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="fpCard">
                            <div class="fpThumb shimmer"></div>
                            <div class="fpLine shimmer"></div>
                            <div class="fpLine sm shimmer"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="fpCard">
                            <div class="fpThumb shimmer"></div>
                            <div class="fpLine shimmer"></div>
                            <div class="fpLine sm shimmer"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="fpCard">
                            <div class="fpThumb shimmer"></div>
                            <div class="fpLine shimmer"></div>
                            <div class="fpLine sm shimmer"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        (function () {
            function removeFP() {
                var el = document.getElementById('firstPaint');
                if (el) el.parentNode.removeChild(el);
            }

            // If Angular renders quickly
            var tries = 0;
            var t = setInterval(function(){
                tries++;
                // common Angular root tags: app-root or similar inside body
                var appRoot = document.querySelector('app-root, .app-root, #app-root');
                // remove when there is real content
                if (appRoot && appRoot.children && appRoot.children.length > 0) {
                    clearInterval(t);
                    removeFP();
                }
                if (tries > 60) { // ~6s max safety fallback
                    clearInterval(t);
                    removeFP();
                }
            }, 100);

            // fallback if something blocks interval
            window.addEventListener('load', function(){
                setTimeout(removeFP, 1200);
            });
        })();
    </script>

                })(window,document,'script','//www.google-analytics.com/analytics.js','ga');
